title: Describing Your Photograph
learningGoal: The learner will fluidly speak at least 5 different English sentences dynamically swapping between 'I', 'He', 'She', and 'We' and their corresponding 'To Be' verbs, including one negative sentence.
instructions: In this exercise, you are showing a family photograph to your English teacher. The teacher will ask you about the people in the picture. You must reply verbally using the correct pronoun (He, She, They) and 'To Be' verb.

contentItems.text: Try your best to use contractions verbally! Say 'He's' instead of 'He is'.

speakingPrompt: Answer the teacher's questions about your photograph out loud.
scenario: You are sitting next to your teacher, looking at a photo on your phone. You have to explain who everyone is.

subTasks.prompt: शिक्षक तस्वीर में एक आदमी की ओर इशारा करते हैं और पूछते हैं, 'Who is he?' (वह कौन है?)। बताएं कि वह आपका भाई है (He is... का उपयोग करें)।
शिक्षक कहते हैं, 'Is he a student?' (क्या वह एक छात्र है?)। उन्हें बताएं कि नहीं, वह एक डॉक्टर है (नकारात्मक वाक्य का उपयोग करें: He is not...)।
expectedSpeakingPoints: Say He is not or He's not

sampleResponse.targetText: No, he is not a student. He is a doctor.
sampleResponse.transliteration: नो, ही इज़ नॉट अ स्टूडेंट। ही इज़ अ डॉक्टर।
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: नहीं, वह एक छात्र नहीं है। वह एक डॉक्टर है।

subTasks.prompt: शिक्षक तस्वीर में एक महिला की ओर इशारा करते हैं और पूछते हैं, 'Who is she?' (वह कौन है?)। बताएं कि वह आपकी बहन है।
शिक्षक पूछते हैं, 'Are they your friends in the back?' (क्या पीछे वाले आपके दोस्त हैं?)। पुष्टि करें कि हाँ, वे मेरे दोस्त हैं।
शिक्षक कहते हैं, 'It is a very nice photo.' (यह बहुत अच्छी तस्वीर है।)। उन्हें बताएं कि आप सभी (हम) खुश हैं। (We are... का उपयोग करें)।

sampleResponse.targetText: Thank you. We are very happy.
sampleResponse.transliteration: थैंक यू। वी आर वेरी हैप्पी।

scenarioContext.targetText: This is a great photo. Who is he?
scenarioContext.transliteration: दिस इज़ अ ग्रेट फोटो। हु इज़ ही?
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: यह एक बहुत अच्छी तस्वीर है। वह कौन है?

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: No, he is not a student. He is a doctor.
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: नो, ही इज़ नॉट अ स्टूडेंट। ही इज़ अ डॉक्टर।
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: नहीं, वह एक छात्र नहीं है। वह एक डॉक्टर है।

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: Thank you. We are very happy.
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: थैंक यू। वी आर वेरी हैप्पी।

scoringRubric.Pronoun Conjugation: Did the user accurately map He to is, She to is, They to are, and We to are while speaking?
scoringRubric.Negative Placement: Did the user say 'He is not' correctly without defaulting to 'no he is'?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: He is my brother. He is not a student, he is a doctor. She is my sister. Yes, they are my friends. We are very happy.

feedbackRules.onPass: Astounding! You have mastered English Subject-Verb agreement natively while speaking.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep practicing! You might be using 'is' with 'They' or forgetting the negative word 'not'. Repeat the phrases slowly.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Ensure you clearly differentiate between 'He' for your brother and 'She' for your sister!

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Teacher: This is a great photo. Who is he?

hintText: If you are struggling to speak fast, do not use contractions. Say 'They are' fully. Speed will come with time.
commonMistakes: Saying 'She is my brother' due to Hindi having no gendered pronoun for 'वह'.
